zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor De Vere於1218年出生在英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_時，她的父親Robert De Vere94歲，母親Isabel De Bolbec39歲。她於大約1249年與Sir Ralph Gernon結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1274年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor De Vere于1218年出生在英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_时，她的父亲Robert De Vere94岁，母亲Isabel De Bolbec39岁。她于大约1249年与Sir Ralph Gernon结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1274年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor De Vere was born in 1218, in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, her father, Robert De Vere, was 94 and her mother, Isabel De Bolbec, was 39. She married Sir Ralph Gernon about 1249. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1274, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor De Vere est née en 1218, à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Vere, avait 94 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Bolbec, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Gernon environ 1249. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor De Vere 1218 in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Vere 94 und ihre Mutter Isabel De Bolbec 39. Sie hat um 1249 Sir Ralph Gernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor De Vere è nata il nel 1218 nel Bakewell, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Robert De Vere, aveva 94 anni e sua madre, Isabel De Bolbec, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Gernon circa 1249. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Vereが1218年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルで生まれた時，父Robert De Vereは94歳，母Isabel De Bolbecは39歳であった。約1249年にSir Ralph Gernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1274年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Vere(이)가 1218년 영국 더비실르 베이케웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Vere(은)는 94세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel De Bolbec(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1249년 Sir Ralph Gernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor De Vere nasceu em 1218, em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert De Vere, tinha 94 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Bolbec, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Gernon aproximadamente 1249. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1274, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor De Vere родилась в 1218 г. в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert De Vere было 94 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Bolbec, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Gernon около 1249 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor De Vere nació en 1218, en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert De Vere, tenía 94 años y su mamá, Isabel De Bolbec, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Gernon aproximadamente 1249. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1274, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
